violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of pink and brown residues. Ice machine was cleaned during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Faucet of the 3-bay sink at the bar is in poor repair. The left side knob is missing and must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
Handsink at the bar has been removed. There is a handsink in the kitchen area. Handsink must be re-installed at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024
